creator: henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 224780
patch to 20210422

This port has no releases; thus, I'm labeling it based on the github commit's date.
Changelog - there's no changelog file or release page. Commit messages:

    Fix build on non-Apple systems.
    added proper definitions for libusrsctp
    Disable main thread wrapping into rtc::Thread.
    Generate GAS-compatible 32-bit ARM ASM files for libvpx on Linux.
    added proper definitions for libusrsctp
    Use -fPIC when BUILD_SHARED_LIBS is enabled
    Remove unneeded Xtst dependency
    Don't build internal audio backends
    Pass all packets to the obverver.

This may affect net-im/telegram-desktop; I'm planning to upgrade it to 2.7.4, anyway.

Poudriere log on 12.2/amd64: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HenryHu/ports/master/.logs/12.2-amd64/tg_owt-0.0.20210422.log
